query:
INSERT INTO public.questions (
    id, question_text, question_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint,
    stimulus_text, stimulus_type, section, topic, difficulty, exam_type,
    is_platform_question, ai_generated, calculator_allowed, subject, subtopic,
    math_domain, pool_key, diagnostic_eligible, tags, external_id, source, source_metadata
  ) VALUES
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The main point of this passage is that',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"writers should always seek feedback from others.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"writing is a complex process that requires both solitary and social aspects.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"the goal of writing is to create a text that will be understood by an audience.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"writing can be both a solitary and a social activity, depending on the writer’s goals.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The author makes it clear that writing can be both solitary and social, depending on the writer''s goals. The author supports this point by explaining that while writers sometimes work alone, they often rely on the feedback of others to shape and refine their work.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author writes, "The process of writing can be a solitary one, but it can also be a very social one. Often, we rely on the feedback of others to help us shape our ideas and refine our work.  This is because writing is a complex process that involves not only the creation of text, but also the consideration of how that text will be received and understood by an audience." What is the author’s main point in this passage?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Expression of Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Expression of Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Expression of Ideas']::text[],
    '76ac865f',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Expression of Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best states the main idea of the text?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The semicolon is a punctuation mark used to join two independent clauses together.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The semicolon should only be used to separate two closely related independent clauses in a sentence.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The semicolon is a punctuation mark used to separate two independent clauses that are closely related.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The semicolon is a punctuation mark used to make writing more sophisticated.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The text describes the semicolon as a punctuation mark that is used to separate two independent clauses that are closely related. This is the main idea of the text, as it explains the primary function of the semicolon in writing.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The use of a semicolon in a sentence, often used to separate two closely related independent clauses, can be a stylistic choice that makes writing more concise and sophisticated. For example, in the sentence "The sky was clear, but the air was cold; we knew that a snowstorm was coming." the semicolon separates the two independent clauses, which each could stand alone as a sentence. The first clause describes the weather, while the second clause describes the implication of the weather. What is the main idea of the text?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    'random_id_d6',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which revision of the sentence maintains the same meaning but uses more formal and precise language?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The victory of the team provided great pride to the players and their families.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The players and their families felt great pride at the team’s victory.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The players and their families were proud of the team''s victory.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The team''s victory was a source of much pride for the players and their families.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'Choice A rephrases the sentence using a more formal structure by replacing the informal ''a source of'' with the more formal ''provided'' and by using a passive construction. The meaning of the sentence remains the same, but the language is more precise and formal.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The following sentence is grammatically correct: "The team’s victory was a source of great pride for the players and their families." How can the sentence be rewritten to maintain the same meaning while using more formal and precise language?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    '45ad213b',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The author of this passage suggests that American art has',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"always been more influenced by European traditions than by American traditions.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"developed independently of European traditions.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"always been more concerned with realism than with abstraction.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"been shaped by both its embrace of and its departure from European traditions.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The passage discusses how American artists have drawn from European traditions while also developing their own unique styles. This shows that American art has been shaped by both its embrace of and its departure from European traditions.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The passage is about the history of American art. The author uses a series of examples to illustrate the development of painting in the United States. The passage begins by discussing the early American painters who were influenced by European traditions. The author then describes the rise of American realism in the nineteenth century, and the passage concludes by exploring the development of abstract art in the twentieth century. The author focuses on the ways in which American artists have both embraced and challenged European traditions. What is the main point of the passage?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    '1532c114',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The authors describe the finding as "revolutionary" most likely because it',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"suggests that the ability to count is a complex skill that could only be developed by a highly intelligent species.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"challenges the long-held belief that ants are incapable of complex thought processes.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"overturns the widely accepted theory that all insects are unable to count.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"provides evidence that some species of ants are more intelligent than others.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The text states that the finding was revolutionary because it challenged the long-held belief that ants were incapable of complex thought processes. The text states that the finding suggested that some species of ants are able to count, which implies that they are capable of a higher level of cognitive function than was previously thought.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The text explains that in 2018, a group of researchers published a study that suggested that some species of ants are able to count. This was a revolutionary finding. What is the most likely reason why the authors call this finding "revolutionary"?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'random_id_e4',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'What is the main idea of this passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"John''s experiences have ultimately led him to a greater understanding of himself and his place in the world.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The author describes a series of events in which the main character, John, struggles to find his place in the world.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The passage progresses, the author gradually reveals the source of John''s unhappiness, ultimately leading the reader to understand the deeper significance of the character''s journey.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The author suggests that John''s experiences, though painful, have ultimately led him to a greater understanding of himself and his place in the world.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The passage is ultimately about the transformative nature of John''s experiences. Though they are painful, they ultimately lead him to a greater understanding of himself and his place in the world. This is the most significant idea presented in the passage.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author describes a series of events in which the main character, John, struggles to find his place in the world.  He is constantly searching for meaning and purpose, and he often feels lost and alone.  Throughout the passage, the author uses vivid imagery and sensory details to help the reader experience John''s inner turmoil.  As the passage progresses, the author gradually reveals the source of John''s unhappiness, ultimately leading the reader to understand the deeper significance of the character''s journey.  The author suggests that John''s experiences, though painful, have ultimately led him to a greater understanding of himself and his place in the world.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'random_id_a1',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The author''s main purpose in the passage is to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"provide a nuanced and balanced analysis of the United States''s role in combating global warming.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"persuade the reader that the United States has made substantial progress in addressing global warming.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"criticize the United States for its inadequate efforts to combat global warming.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"examine the historical development of the United States''s approach to climate change.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The author''s main purpose is to persuade the reader that the United States has made substantial progress in addressing global warming. The author uses several pieces of evidence to support this claim, such as the United States''s leading role in international negotiations on climate change and its significant investments in clean energy technologies.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author of the passage claims that "the United States has been at the forefront of the fight against global warming." The author then cites several pieces of evidence to support this claim. For example, the author points out that the United States has been a leading voice in international negotiations on climate change. The author also mentions that the United States has made significant investments in clean energy technologies. Which of the following best describes the author''s main purpose in this passage?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'random_id_e4',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which of the following best summarizes the central idea of this passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The passage emphasizes the importance of staying ahead of the curve by being adaptable to changing circumstances and embracing new challenges.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The passage focuses on the importance of continuous learning and growth in order to succeed.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The passage stresses the importance of challenging oneself and stepping out of one''s comfort zone in order to achieve success.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The passage suggests that the world is changing at an unprecedented rate and that we must be willing to change with it.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The passage emphasizes the importance of being adaptable to changing circumstances and embracing new challenges.  It suggests that the world is constantly changing and that we must be willing to change with it in order to succeed.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The most important thing, however, is that we must not allow ourselves to become complacent. We must never forget that we are constantly evolving, constantly changing.  We must never stop learning and growing. As we are constantly moving forward, it is important to adapt to the changing circumstances.  It is equally important to embrace new challenges and to seek out new opportunities.  The world around us is changing at an unprecedented rate, and if we want to stay ahead of the curve, we must be willing to change with it.  We must be willing to step out of our comfort zones and to challenge ourselves. Only then can we hope to truly succeed. What is the central idea of this passage?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'random_id_e3',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'What is the central idea of this passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The importance of having a broad perspective on knowledge and history.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The need to consider the potential applications of knowledge in the real world.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The importance of considering the social implications of knowledge and history.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The need to be aware of the larger historical and social forces that shape the events and ideas we encounter.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The passage emphasizes the importance of having a broad perspective, considering the larger context of what is being learned, and being aware of the historical and social factors that have shaped it.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'From the very first day of class, Ms. Thomas reminded her students of the importance of thinking about the larger context of what they were learning. She stressed that their studies were not isolated from the world and that they should always consider how their knowledge could be applied to real-world situations. And she emphasized the need for students to be aware of the broader historical and social forces that shaped the events and ideas they encountered. "You can’t understand anything in isolation," she would say. "You have to look at the big picture."',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    '62ac916c',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice combines the two sentences into a single sentence with correct punctuation and grammar? ',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The author of \"The Time Traveler''s Wife\" is Audrey Niffenegger, a novelist whose work has been translated into over 40 languages, and she has also written the graphic novel \"The Three Incantations\" and the novel \"Her Fearful Symmetry.\"","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The author of \"The Time Traveler''s Wife\" is Audrey Niffenegger, a novelist whose work has been translated into over 40 languages; she has also written the graphic novel \"The Three Incantations\" and the novel \"Her Fearful Symmetry.\"","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The author of \"The Time Traveler''s Wife\" is Audrey Niffenegger, a novelist whose work has been translated into over 40 languages, she has also written the graphic novel \"The Three Incantations\" and the novel \"Her Fearful Symmetry.\"","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The author of \"The Time Traveler''s Wife\" is Audrey Niffenegger, a novelist whose work has been translated into over 40 languages, she has also written the graphic novel \"The Three Incantations\" and the novel \"Her Fearful Symmetry\".","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'Choice A is the best answer. The two sentences are joined with a comma and a coordinating conjunction ("and"), which is a correct way to combine two independent clauses. Choice B is incorrect because a semicolon can’t be used to join two independent clauses. Choice C is incorrect because the comma before "she" creates a comma splice. Choice D is incorrect because there is no punctuation between the two independent clauses.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author of "The Time Traveler''s Wife" is Audrey Niffenegger, a novelist whose work has been translated into over 40 languages. She has also written the graphic novel "The Three Incantations" and the novel "Her Fearful Symmetry." Niffenegger''s work often explores themes of time, memory, and fate, and her novels are known for their intricate plots and thought-provoking characters. What is the best way to combine the two sentences into a single sentence?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    'random_id_c3',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best completes the text with the most logical transition?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"It is an account of his experiences that forces Huck to change.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"Huck''s experiences are reflected in his evolving understanding of the world.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"Huck’s journey is the most important aspect of the novel.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"Huck''s journey is a long and arduous one.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The sentence before the blank states that Huck''s journey challenges him to understand complexities, and the sentence after the blank describes the novel''s focus on those complexities.  Therefore, the logical transition is to explain how the journey affects Huck''s understanding.  Choice B correctly makes that connection.  Choice A is incorrect because it describes what the journey does, not how it is reflected. Choice C is incorrect because it is not relevant to the prompt''s focus on the word "you." Choice D is incorrect because it provides unnecessary background information that is not directly relevant to the prompt.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'In the novel *The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn* by Mark Twain, the young protagonist, Huck, embarks on a journey down the Mississippi River with Jim, a runaway slave.  Huck’s journey forces him to confront the injustices of slavery and to question the morality of the society in which he lives.  Huck’s experiences, as a young boy coming of age, challenge him to understand the complexities of race, friendship, and freedom in a rapidly changing world.  How, for instance, is the impact of Huck’s journey reflected in the novel?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    'random_id_e9',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice provides the best way to combine the sentences in the underlined portion without changing the meaning?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The process of Earth’s shifting from warmer to colder climates, and back again, is known as the Quaternary Ice Age—during an ice age, glaciers grow and expand, covering large areas of the planet.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The process of Earth’s shifting from warmer to colder climates, and back again, is known as the Quaternary Ice Age; during an ice age, glaciers grow and expand, covering large areas of the planet.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The process of Earth’s shifting from warmer to colder climates, and back again, is known as the Quaternary Ice Age; glaciers grow and expand, covering large areas of the planet, during an ice age.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The process of Earth’s shifting from warmer to colder climates, and back again, is known as the Quaternary Ice Age, during an ice age, glaciers grow and expand, covering large areas of the planet.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The best way to combine the sentences is to use a comma and a conjunction. The sentence would then be "The process of Earth’s shifting from warmer to colder climates, and back again, is known as the Quaternary Ice Age, during an ice age, glaciers grow and expand, covering large areas of the planet."',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'As the planet''s orbit carries it closer to the sun, the amount of light and heat received by Earth increases, and the Earth''s climate shifts dramatically.  The process of Earth’s shifting from warmer to colder climates, and back again, is known as the Quaternary Ice Age.  During an ice age, glaciers grow and expand, covering large areas of the planet, but between ice ages, glaciers melt and retreat.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    '805f9387',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The second paragraph in the passage is most likely included to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"provide examples of Shakespeare’s use of humor.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"argue that Shakespeare''s use of humor is more effective than other types of humor.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"explain why Shakespeare''s use of humor is so popular.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"introduce the idea that Shakespeare''s use of humor is intentional.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The second paragraph provides examples of how Shakespeare uses humor to support the main idea presented in the first paragraph of the passage.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The first paragraph of the passage introduces the subject of the text, which is the use of humor in Shakespeare''s plays. The second paragraph discusses the various ways in which Shakespeare uses humor, including wordplay, mistaken identity, and physical comedy. The third paragraph offers a brief analysis of how Shakespeare''s use of humor contributes to the overall effect of his plays. What is the most likely reason why the writer includes the second paragraph in the passage?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Craft and Structure']::text[],
    '7b8d49a2',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Craft and Structure","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best combines the sentences at the underlined portion to create a grammatically correct and stylistically effective sentence?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"Stark’s travels, which often took her to remote and difficult places, were always accompanied by a keen sense of adventure, and she is often credited with pioneering new routes in some of the world’s most difficult terrains.  ","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"Stark’s travels, which often took her to remote and difficult places, were always accompanied by a keen sense of adventure, and she is often credited with pioneering new routes in some of the world’s most difficult terrains, and","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"Stark’s travels, which often took her to remote and difficult places, were always accompanied by a keen sense of adventure, and she is often credited with pioneering new routes in some of the world’s most difficult terrains;  ","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"Stark’s travels, which often took her to remote and difficult places, were always accompanied by a keen sense of adventure; she is often credited with pioneering new routes in some of the world’s most difficult terrains.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The semicolon creates a grammatically correct separation between the two independent clauses.  This option also produces a smoother, more flowing sentence than the other choices.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'An early-twentieth-century travel writer, Freya Stark, is known for her adventurous and detailed descriptions of her journeys. She’s regarded for her writings, as well as her elegant prose style, which was inspired by her education at a private school for girls. Stark’s travels, which often took her to remote and difficult places, were always accompanied by a keen sense of adventure, and she is often credited with pioneering new routes in some of the world’s most difficult terrains. Stark’s writings not only describe the places she visited, but they also record her reflections on the people she met and the cultures she encountered.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,

    'Which of the following is the most effective way to combine the sentences in the underlined portion of the passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The fish, which was named *Aureus mirabilis*, is a deep-sea creature that has adapted to survive in extreme conditions, such as high pressure and darkness.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The fish, which was named *Aureus mirabilis*, is a deep-sea creature, it has adapted to survive in extreme conditions, such as high pressure and darkness.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The fish, which was named *Aureus mirabilis*, is a deep-sea creature; it has adapted to survive in extreme conditions, such as high pressure and darkness.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The fish, which was named *Aureus mirabilis*, is a deep-sea creature, has adapted to survive in extreme conditions, such as high pressure and darkness.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'Choice A is the most effective way to combine the sentences because it uses a comma to separate the two independent clauses, which is the correct way to punctuate two independent clauses when they are joined by a comma. Choice C is incorrect because it uses a semicolon to separate two independent clauses when they should be separated by a comma or a conjunction. Choice D is incorrect because it uses a comma to separate two independent clauses when they should be separated by a semicolon or a conjunction.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The scientists were excited about the discovery of the new species of fish, which they believe has the potential to revolutionize the field of marine biology. Scientists are currently studying the fish’s unique physiology and behavior, which could lead to important breakthroughs in our understanding of life in the deep sea.',

    'A',
    'The word "ritual" suggests that the villagers’ actions are part of a long-standing tradition that has been passed down through generations.     'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'In "The Lottery," Shirley Jackson uses the word "ritual" to describe the yearly tradition of stoning a villager to death. Although the villagers claim that the tradition helps to ensure a good harvest, the reader understands that the tradition is ultimately rooted in fear and superstition.
